channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: La apuesta de Discover por la nube híbrida da sus frutos
item.description: Discover Financial Services se ha trasladado agresivamente a la nube en 2024 con una estrategia de migración centrada en conservar la flexibilidad híbrida y aprovechar al máximo la elasticidad de la nube.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 7 azioni chiave da intraprendere nel 2025 per un CIO sempre più autorevole
item.description: Nei prossimi 12 mesi i CIO hanno due grandi priorità: sviluppare un solido business case per la spesa in infrastruttura per l’intelligenza artificiale e aumentare la cybersicurezza e la resilienza.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Rhode Islanders' data was leaked from a cyberattack on state health benefits website
item.description: PROVIDENCE, R.I. (AP) — Cybercriminals who hacked Rhode Island’s system for health and benefits programs have released files to a site on the dark web, a scenario the state has been preparing for, Gov. Daniel McKee said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Homeland Security helps write the book on how to acquire artificial intelligence
item.description: Few departments have more diverse procurement needs than Homeland Security. The agency operates on natural disasters, immigration activity and cybersecurity. The post Homeland Security helps write the book on how to acquire artificial intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Former US lieutenant general warns Musk poses national security risks
item.description: A former U.S. lieutenant general warned Sunday that Elon Musk, the tech billionaire who has become intricately involved in President-elect Trump’s transition, may pose national security risks due to his ties to China and Russia. Retired Lt. Gen.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Verizon, Nvidia team up for enterprise AI networking
item.description: Verizon and Nvidia have partnered to build AI services for enterprises that run workloads over Verizon’s 5G private network. The new offering, 5G Private Network with Enterprise AI, will run a range of AI applications and workloads over Verizon’s private 5G network with Mobile Edge Compute (MEC).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Change management: Achieve your goals with the right change model
item.description: Change and transformation. Everyone talks about it and knows how necessary it is to adapt quickly to permanently changing conditions. And yet change is difficult.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meet the mad scientist of headphones, whose wild designs electrify Reddit
item.description: The standard shape for big, chunky headphones has long been a rainbow with Moon Pies at either end. No rule exists, however, forcing audio companies to keep making them that way. Philip Kaplan, the tech entrepreneur behind Tiny Letter and DistroKid, has been proving as much all year.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: The highs and lows of commercial real estate in 2024: Bay Area offices, hotels and apartments falter, but tech deals offer hope
item.description: Widening loan defaults and foreclosures haunted Bay Area office, hotel and apartment properties in 2024 but a flurry of tech leases are creating some hope.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Millions of Android smartphones were quietly enlisted into one of the biggest crowdsourced navigation projects ever
item.description: Google researchers use Android smartphones to map ionospheric TEC, doubling coverage, improving positioning accuracy, and benefiting underserved global regions.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Some Meta Quest headsets are being bricked by a software update – but a fix is rolling out
item.description: The latest v71 and v72 software updates have been locking users out of their devices over the holidays.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Musk calls some MAGA supporters ‘contemptible fools’ as visa row intensifies
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk labeled a section of President-elect Trump supporters as “contemptible fools” as the online debate around visas for highly skilled workers on the right intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to delay TikTok ban so he can weigh in after he takes office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has asked the Supreme Court to pause the potential TikTok ban from going into effect until his administration can pursue a “political resolution” to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and local consulates if they think they are about to be detained by the U.S. immigration department, a senior official said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 15 tech luminaries we lost in 2024
item.description: The computing industry was founded with mainframes intended for the few. Bringing computers to the masses was the work of generations, such as the trailblazers we honor in this story.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The top Google Pixel tips of 2024
item.description: More and more, there are Android tips — and then there are Pixel tips. Owning a Google Pixel phone has become a ticket of sorts to a uniquely top-tier type of Android experience.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Here are the key tech, workforce provisions in the 2025 intel authorization bill
item.description: The latest authorization bill pushes the intelligence community to boost many of its workforce and tech efforts, including its public-private talent exchange. The post Here are the key tech, workforce provisions in the 2025 intel authorization bill first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Homeland Security launches internal AI chatbot for 19,000 staff
item.description: The tool, called DHSChat, will be available to approximately 19,000 employees at DHS headquarters and select pilot users across ten operating agencies.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation
